mapper.select:
SELECT r.*, b.name as building_name, u.name as unit_name, o.name as owner_name, o.phone as owner_phone FROM bus_room r LEFT JOIN bus_unit u ON r.unit_id = u.id LEFT JOIN bus_building b ON r.building_id = b.id
LEFT JOIN bus_room_owner ro ON r.id = ro.room_id AND ro.relation_type = 1
LEFT JOIN bus_owner o ON ro.owner_id = o.id
r.is_deleted = 0
AND ${ew.sqlSegment}

SELECT r.*, b.name AS buildingName, u.name AS unitName FROM bus_room r INNER JOIN bus_room_owner ro ON r.id = ro.room_id LEFT JOIN bus_building b ON r.building_id = b.id LEFT JOIN bus_unit u ON r.unit_id = u.id WHERE ro.owner_id = #{ownerId} AND ro.is_deleted = 0 AND r.is_deleted = 0
